children.heading: Allocations to local educational agencies
children.label: a Allocations to local educational agencies

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: From the funds reserved by a State under , the State shall allocate to each local educational agency in the State that has an application approved by the State educational agency under an amount that bears the same relationship to the total amount of such reservation as the amount the local educational agency received under subpart 2 of part A of subchapter I for the preceding fiscal year bears to the total amount received by all local educational agencies in the State under such subpart for the preceding fiscal year.section 7114(a)(1) of this titlesection 7116 of this title

children.heading: Minimum local educational agency allocation
children.label: 2 Minimum local educational agency allocation
children.text: No allocation to a local educational agency under this subsection may be made in an amount that is less than $10,000, subject to subsection (b).

children.heading: Consortia
children.label: 3 Consortia
children.text: Local educational agencies in a State may form a consortium with other surrounding local educational agencies and combine the funds each such agency in the consortium receives under this section to jointly carry out the local activities described in this subpart.

children.heading: Ratable reduction
children.label: b Ratable reduction
children.text: If the amount reserved by the State under is insufficient to make allocations to local educational agencies in an amount equal to the minimum allocation described in subsection (a)(2), such allocations shall be ratably reduced.section 7114(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: Administrative costs
children.label: c Administrative costs
children.text: Of the amount received under subsection (a)(2), a local educational agency may reserve not more than 2 percent for the direct administrative costs of carrying out the local educational agency’s responsibilities under this subpart.
